name: run_id
description: Unique identifier for one benchmark execution run.

name: benchmark_id
description: Identifier from data/benchmark_catalog.json or an extension benchmark.

name: category_id
description: Primary taxonomy bucket used for aggregation.

name: benchmark_split
description: Public, private, dev, test, heldout, or custom split.

name: model_name
description: Base model name.

name: model_provider
description: Provider or organization behind the model.

name: agent_framework
description: Agent framework or runtime used in the evaluation.

name: tool_runtime
description: Tool runtime, MCP host, browser stack, or sandbox implementation.

name: defense_profile
description: Active safety defense, guardrail, or hardening profile.

name: dataset_version
description: Version tag of the benchmark dataset.

name: commit_or_image
description: Git commit, container image, or release tag for reproducibility.

name: run_date
description: Execution date in ISO 8601 format.

name: metric_primary
description: Name of the main reported metric such as ASR, harmful success, or safe completion.

name: score_primary
description: Value of the main metric.

name: metric_secondary
description: Optional secondary metric name.

name: score_secondary
description: Optional secondary metric value.

name: sample_count
description: Number of evaluated samples or episodes.

name: success_direction
description: Interpretation of the primary metric.

name: notes
description: Short notes on evaluator settings, exclusions, or caveats.

name: source_url
description: Link to paper, run log, or reproducibility artifact.
